leadText: The Black Glasses (Japanese: くろいメガネ Black Glasses), formatted BlackGlasses prior to Generation VI, is a type of held item introduced in Generation II that boosts the power of Dark-type moves.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Generations II and III [ edit | edit source ] Boosts the power of the holder's Dark-type moves by 10%. Generation IV onward [ edit | edit source ] Boosts the power of the holder's Dark-type moves by 20%.
